overviewDesc: View local data directory, database and object usage, and health status.
backupDesc: Create a full backup (database + objects) or restore from an existing backup. A safety backup is created before restore.
restoreConfirmMessage: Restore from backup "{{name}}"? Current data will be backed up first. This cannot be undone.
restoreSuccessMessage: Restored from {{from}}. Safety backup: {{safety}}. Restart recommended.
